ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., prison, jail, detention center) */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state where the facility is located */,
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or region where the facility is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of inmates or staff the facility can hold */,
  "current_population" INTEGER /* Current number of inmates or staff */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the facility */,
  "medical_facilities" TEXT /* Information about medical facilities available */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last health and safety inspection */,
  "inspection_report" TEXT /* Summary of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces_states" (
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province or state */,
  "province_state_name" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or region where the province or state is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the province or state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the province or state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "health_department_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the health department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries_regions" (
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or region */,
  "country_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country or region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country or region */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "health_department_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the health department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the case was reported */,
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case type */,
  "confirmed_date" TEXT /* Date the case was confirmed */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death (if applicable) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any pre-existing conditions or medical history */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Recorded symptoms of the case */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., active, recovered, deceased) */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date of recovery (if applicable) */,
  "isolation_status" INTEGER /* Whether the case is in isolation */,
  "quarantine_date" TEXT /* Date the case entered quarantine */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status (e.g., fully vaccinated, partially vaccinated, not vaccinated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_case_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_type_id") REFERENCES case_types ("case_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case associated with the demographic information */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the case */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the case */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the case */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the case */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the case */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the case */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "case_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the case type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_cases" (
  "facility_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility case summary */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility associated with the summary */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases at the facility */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths at the facility */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases at the facility */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases at the facility */,
  "isolation_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of isolation beds available */,
  "quarantine_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of quarantine spaces available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_cases_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "province_state_cases" (
  "province_state_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province or state case summary */,
  "province_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province or state associated with the summary */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases in the province or state */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the province or state */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases in the province or state */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases in the province or state */,
  "isolation_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of isolation beds available in the province or state */,
  "quarantine_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of quarantine spaces available in the province or state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_state_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_province_state_cases_province_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_state_id") REFERENCES provinces_states ("province_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_region_cases" (
  "country_region_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or region case summary */,
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or region associated with the summary */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases in the country or region */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the country or region */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases in the country or region */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases in the country or region */,
  "isolation_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of isolation beds available in the country or region */,
  "quarantine_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of quarantine spaces available in the country or region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_region_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_region_cases_country_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_region_id") REFERENCES countries_regions ("country_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time-series entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case associated with the time-series entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the time-series entry */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases on the given date */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases on the given date */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases on the given date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases on the given date */,
  "isolation_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases in isolation on the given date */,
  "quarantine_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases in quarantine on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the device */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data retrieval */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for authentication */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the data source representative */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import event */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source associated with the import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the data import */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the imported data file */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported data file */,
  "imported_by" TEXT /* User who imported the data */,
  "import_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the import process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)
